sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64783" key="malakoko/lac" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μᾰλᾰκο-κόλαξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ᾰκος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n64783.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">voluptuous parasite</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1270.tlg001:26" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Clearch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">26</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
